grammar_tips.title: Time to Write!
grammar_tips.explanation: In these exercises, there's no single correct answer — write freely using what you've learned. A teacher will read your response and give you feedback. Don't worry about being perfect. Use what you know: mi chiamo, sono di, ho ... anni, ho fame/sete/freddo, and anything else from earlier units.

prompt.text: Introduce yourself in Italian. Include your name, where you're from, and your age.

exercises.correct_answer: Ciao! Mi chiamo Marco. Sono di Roma. Ho venti anni.
hints: Use mi chiamo, sono di, and ho ... anni.

prompt.text: Describe what you have. Mention at least 2 things you own (pets, objects, family members).

exercises.correct_answer: Ho un cane e un gatto. Ho una macchina. Ho un fratello e una sorella.
hints: Use ho + un/una. Think about: cane, gatto, macchina, bicicletta, fratello, sorella.

prompt.text: How are you feeling right now? Write 2-3 sentences about how you feel using avere idioms.

exercises.correct_answer: Ho fame e ho sete. Non ho sonno. Ho voglia di un caffè!
hints: Use: ho fame, ho sete, ho freddo, ho caldo, ho sonno, ho paura, ho voglia di...
